meta.title: ESG & Impact | Prayaan Capital
meta.description: Prayaan Capital's environmental, social, and governance initiatives — financial inclusion and MSME empowerment.

sections.headline: Finance for a Better South India
sections.subheadline: Our ESG commitments go beyond compliance — they define why we exist.

sections.headline: Financial Inclusion Mission
sections.body: Over 70% of our loan book serves borrowers in Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities where formal credit access is limited. We deliberately price loans to be competitive while remaining sustainable — because affordable credit is the foundation of MSME growth.

sections.headline: Women Entrepreneur Support
sections.body: We actively target women-owned and women-led MSMEs, who face disproportionate barriers to formal credit. Over 40% of our borrowers are women entrepreneurs across textiles, retail, healthcare, and services.

sections.headline: Governance Standards
sections.body: Prayaan Capital adheres to RBI NBFC governance norms, maintains an independent board with qualified independent directors, and publishes audited financials annually. Zero tolerance for coercive recovery practices.
